name: ASUS TUF GAMING B760M-PLUS WIFI D4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B760M-PLUS WIFI D4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 support, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6.
